factors.summary: The revenue mix is shifting towards higher-margin segments, which is beneficial for overall performance. This shift is particularly evident in the Residential and Commercial Heating & Cooling sectors, which have higher profit margins compared to Refrigeration.

evidence.text: Gross profit margin in the third quarter of 2015 increased 110 basis points to 28.6% compared to the third quarter of 2014. Our profit margin increased 190 bps from lower material costs, 40 bps from price, and 30 bps from foreign currency translation.

sentiment.label: positive
